security_rules: Gemini API Keys must be sent via Headers, NEVER URLs
Database must be encrypted with SQLCipher
Backend must have rate limiting (10 req/min)
Backend CORS must be restricted to trusted origins
Error messages must be sanitized for production

patterns: Key Rotation Strategy for Gemini API
Dynamic Port Binding ($PORT) for Cloud Deployment
gotchas: Railway: Must copy local libraries into build context subfolder
Railway: Requires sh -c to interpolate environment variables in Docker CMD
CORS: ALLOWED_ORIGINS must include Railway generated domain
Avoid 404 for model rotation: Stick to 1.5 Flash/Pro stable
